text:
Once upon a time in the heart of the Enchanted Forest, there was a tiny kitten named Whisker who had just lost her mother. Whisker felt very sad and alone, as she had no one to teach her the secrets of the forest.

One sunny morning, while Whisker was wandering aimlessly, she met a wise old owl named Oliver. Oliver, noticing the sadness in Whisker’s eyes, decided to befriend her. He shared his knowledge about the forest with her, teaching her how to find food, how to avoid dangers, and most importantly, how to make friends.

As days passed, Whisker became more confident and brave. She learned that the forest was not only a place full of wonders but also a community where every creature played its part. Whisker even made new friends like Benny the badger and Daisy the deer.

One evening, as the sun set behind the mountains, Oliver called all the animals together to celebrate Whisker
